itemSummaries.title: Convert Any API Documentation into a CLI for AI Agents
itemSummaries.titleZh: 将任意API文档转换为AI代理CLI工具
itemSummaries.summary: pug是一个开源工具，可将任意API文档转换为AI代理可直接使用的CLI工具，支持通过命令行交互调用API。
itemSummaries.recommendation: 工程团队可利用此工具快速为内部API或第三方服务构建AI代理交互入口，降低代理开发门槛，建议在AI代理项目中尝试集成。

itemSummaries.title: 卡帕西开源Agent自进化训练框架，5分钟一轮实验，48h内揽星9.5k
itemSummaries.summary: 卡帕西开源Agent自进化训练框架，可在5分钟内完成一轮实验，仅用48小时就在GitHub获得9.5k stars，目标是模拟整个博士社群进行协同学习。
itemSummaries.recommendation: 建议本周优先评估《卡帕西开源Agent自进化训练框架，5分钟一轮实验，48h内揽星9.5k》相关方案，重点关注仓库成熟度与二次开发成本。

itemSummaries.title: Nvidia Is Planning to Launch an Open-Source AI Agent Platform
itemSummaries.summary: Nvidia计划推出开源AI Agent平台，为开发者提供新的AI应用开发基础设施。
itemSummaries.recommendation: 密切关注该平台的后续发展，它可能为工程团队带来新的AI应用开发范式和工具选择。

itemSummaries.title: The Requirements Layer Your AI System Is Missing
itemSummaries.summary: 文章探讨AI系统开发中常被忽视的需求层（Requirements Layer）设计问题，阐述为何
itemSummaries.recommendation: 建议本周优先评估《The Requirements Layer Your AI System Is Missing》相关方案，重点关注对业务路线图与资源投入的影响。

itemSummaries.title: AI-powered 10-minute habit that taught my kid to read (and made me a better dad)
itemSummaries.summary: 作者分享了利用AI在10分钟内帮助孩子学会阅读的经历，展示了生成式AI在儿童启蒙教育中的实际应用效果。
itemSummaries.recommendation: 建议本周优先评估《AI-powered 10-minute habit that taught my kid to read (and made me a better dad)》相关方案，重点关注对业务路线图与资源投入的影响。

itemSummaries.title: Show HN: I built an AI-powered technical interview prep tool
itemSummaries.recommendation: 建议本周优先评估《Show HN: I built an AI-powered technical interview prep tool》相关方案，重点关注与现有工程链路的集成成本。

itemSummaries.summary: SRAM-centric芯片正在成为AI推理领域的新兴技术
itemSummaries.recommendation: 建议本周优先评估《The emerging role of SRAM-centric chips in AI inference》相关方案，重点关注对业务路线图与资源投入的影响。

itemSummaries.title: 首个物理AI数据基座平台“无垠”落户浙江，专治机器人数据荒，家庭工业商业场景全覆盖
itemSummaries.summary: 首个物理AI数据基座平台“无垠”在浙江发布，旨在解决机器人训练数据短缺问题，贯通从训练到商业化落地的全流程，覆盖家庭、工业、商业等多元场景。
itemSummaries.recommendation: 该平台填补了物理AI领域的数据基础设施空白，对于需要大规模机器人数据的工程团队具有重要参考价值，尤其适合需要快速验证AI模型落地的团队。

rankedItems.title: Show HN: I built an AI-powered technical interview prep tool
rankedItems.contentSnippet: LeetCode wasn't actually preparing me or anyone else for the pressure of a real technical interview. Most platforms just give you a text box and a compiler. I wanted something that actually simulates the back-and-forth of an interviewer pushing you on time complexity, asking follow-up questions, and pointing out edge cases you missed. > The Stack: I built the backend with nestjs, prisma, postgresql, Webrtc for real time back and forth conv and [socket.io](http://socket.io) events in panel like code run etc…. claude-haiku-4-5 for conv and anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6 for interview scoring. > Where it still falls short: It’s not perfect. Sometimes the AI gets overly pedantic about syntax instead of focusing on the core algorithmic logic. I’m still tuning the prompts to make it behave more like a senior engineer and less like a strict compiler. I'm currently trying to stress-test the system. I’d love for you to try breaking the AI interviewer or tell me why this approach is flawed. Happy to answer any questions about the stack or the prompt engineering. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47317236 Points: 1 # Comments: 1
